questions.text: A rectangle 10cm by 8cm has a 6cm by 3cm rectangle cut from one corner. What is the area of the remaining cardboard?
What is a composite figure?

options.A: A figure made up of two or more shapes joined together
options.B: A figure with curved edges only
options.C: A figure made up of two or more shapes joined together
options.D: A figure with no equal sides

questions.text: To find the area of a composite figure made by cutting a shape from a larger shape, you should:

options.C: Subtract the area of the cut-out from the larger shape
options.D: Subtract the area of the cut-out from the larger shape

Mario has a rectangular garden measuring 12m by 9m. He wants to put a pebble path 1m wide around the border of his garden. Draw a diagram and explain how to find the total area covered by the pebbles.
questions.answer: First find the outer rectangle dimensions: length = 12 + 1 + 1 = 14m, breadth = 9 + 1 + 1 = 11m. Outer area = 14 × 11 = 154 m². Inner area (garden alone) = 12 × 9 = 108 m². Path area = 154 − 108 = 46 m².

questions.text: The school had a picnic. The table shows food brought by pupils: Burger 4 pupils, Chicken Nugget 8 pupils, Fried Noodle 6 pupils, Salad 2 pupils, Others 5 pupils. Present this data in a bar graph and explain which food was most popular and by how much.
questions.answer: Draw a bar graph with food types on the horizontal axis and number of pupils on the vertical axis. Chicken Nugget bar should be tallest (8 pupils). Most popular: Chicken Nugget with 8 pupils. Least popular: Salad with 2 pupils. Difference = 8 − 2 = 6 pupils.

questions.text: A plane departs Singapore at 22:50 on Wednesday and lands in Bali at 01:20 on Thursday. How long was the flight? Did the plane arrive on the same day or the next day? Explain your reasoning.
questions.answer: The flight lasted 2 hours 30 minutes. The plane departed on Wednesday night and arrived on Thursday early morning, so it arrived the next day. From 22:50 to midnight (24:00) is 1 hour 10 minutes. From 00:00 to 01:20 is 1 hour 20 minutes. Total: 1h 10m + 1h 20m = 2h 30m.

questions.text: Shirley took the MRT at Sembawang Station and reached Newton Station 26 minutes later. She arrived at Newton Station at 11:20. At what time did she board the train at Sembawang Station? Show your working.
questions.answer: To find the departure time, subtract 26 minutes from 11:20. 11:20 minus 20 minutes = 11:00. Then minus 6 more minutes = 10:54. Shirley boarded the train at 10:54 a.m.

questions.text: Remy started his Science practice paper at 8 a.m. He spent 2 minutes on each of 30 multiple-choice questions, and 3 minutes on each of 14 open-ended questions. At what time did he complete the paper? Show your working.
questions.answer: MCQ time: 30 × 2 = 60 minutes. Open-ended time: 14 × 3 = 42 minutes. Total time: 60 + 42 = 102 minutes = 1 hour 42 minutes. Starting at 8:00 a.m., adding 1 hour 42 minutes: 8:00 + 1h 42m = 9:42 a.m. Remy completed the paper at 9:42 a.m.
